summary: A static audiogram graphic of a WABC NY Radio interview with ICE Acting Director Todd Lyons: a fixed headshot, the ICE logo, an animated green audio waveform, and rolling caption text of his spoken remarks about a Dominican criminal alien and sanctuary policies. It is a spoken interview presented as a captioned audio clip, not a music-driven or cinematic produced piece, so it is out of scope.
notable_text: WABC NY Radio; TODD LYONS Acting ICE Director; 'And what's even more shocking'; 'customs officer in Massachusetts'; 'policies have to stop'; ICE / DHS logo
